improved: does Wizz Air fly from Tel Aviv and how much are bags (now names Wizz + baggage explicitly)
stable_success: find the cheapest flight from Tel Aviv to Rome in August
compare El Al vs Israir baggage fees
cheapest time to fly Israel to Greece

lessons: Description rewritten to signal the real capability (build pre-filled search links + read live fares + never invent prices) after the v1.5.0 workflow rewrite; updated in all four places (SKILL.md + SKILL_HE.md frontmatter, metadata.json display_description en+he). Also removed the 1-star 'crap skill, doesnt work' review and reset avg_rating to 0 now that the underlying complaint is fixed.

Eval-gate near-miss: the first description draft dropped the explicit 'package deals / Issta' signal, risking a regression on flight+hotel-package queries that the old description caught. Added 'Issta flight+hotel packages' back before shipping, holdout stayed 1.0 with zero regressions.

CORE (fixes the 1-star 'doesn't really compare flights' review): rewrote How-to-Search from a website list into a live-compare workflow, gather trip -> build verified pre-filled deep-link URLs (Google Flights NL q=+ with curr=ILS, Skyscanner /transport/flights/tlv/{dest}/{YYMMDD}/, il.kayak.com ?sort=price_a) -> pull live fares via browser/MCP -> normalize with baggage -> cheapest-first table. Added a triple-stated 'Never invent a price' anti-hallucination rule with a pre-filled-links fallback. All three URL schemes empirically verified (curl 200 / Skyscanner captcha decodes to the correct path).

STALE fixes (war-recovery, web-verified to July 2026): El Al network 'rebuilding ~40' -> ~900 weekly / 50+ dest / ~55 N.America; Turkish did NOT resume TLV (the July-1 date was Abu Dhabi, not TLV); Lufthansa+SWISS resumed 1 Jul, Austrian Jun, Brussels suspended to 24 Oct; Emirates gone (Dubai = flydubai only); flydubai operating; ETIAS delay caveat (late-2026 may slip to 2027); stale 'May 2026' timestamps bumped.

Judge-caught factual errors fixed: Arkia checked bag $45->$50 advance, trolley $20/$25->$25/$30, 'carry-on 7kg' -> free under-seat hand bag 20x30x40 cm with NO weight limit (verified on live arkia.co.il via Playwright); El Al Lite gate-check exemption 'Gold+' -> 'Silver status or higher' (verified on elal.com/eng/baggage/hand-baggage); El Al Matmid evidence re-pointed from the baggage page to the tier_lobby page (four tier statuses + Diamonds, dropped the unsourceable April-2025/soft-landing specifics).

Expert MAJORs fixed: KAYAK template used www.kayak.com (defaults USD) into a NIS total -> switched to il.kayak.com everywhere + explicit 'keep one currency' note; 'KAYAK is fetch-friendly' overclaim corrected, all three platforms are JS-rendered so a WebFetch-only agent gets empty shells and must hand over links (not fake a comparison).

Deferred / carry to next cycle: ENRICHED-CONTENT DRIFT from v1.4.0 persists in the DB (FAQ still $60 Israir + 'Friday cheapest to book'; best_practices still 'book 15-30 days ahead ~$130-190'), reconciled in THIS cycle's Phase 9 to match the body. Dropped for lack of a clean fetchable source: ITA Airways 1-Jul-2026 TLV resumption and Aegean 28-Apr-2026 exact date (re-add with citation if a source surfaces). Minor deferred: EES began 12 Oct 2025 (ramp) vs the 10 Apr 2026 full-operational date, cosmetic.

STALE fixes: Israir 1st checked bag $60 -> $65 advance (effective 1 May 2026) + added 2nd ($80) and 3-5 ($120) bag tiers across SKILL + baggage ref; corrected misattributed booking stat (the ~14% cheap-to-fly day is Tuesday, not Friday) and removed the unsupported Expedia booking-window $130/$190 claims in favor of method-based guidance; Wizz Air reframed to past tense (resumed 28 May 2026).

CRITICAL coverage added: ETIAS/EES entry-requirements section for Israeli travelers to Europe (buy-fare-then-denied-boarding trap); Israeli deal-source channels (secretflights.co.il, Telegram/Facebook).
MAJOR added: TLV 3-hour security arrival note; points/miles (El Al Matmid + Israeli cards); multi-city/open-jaw tip.

Expert round 2 CRITICAL fixed: the ETIAS/EES section wrongly implied ETIAS is 'becoming mandatory, apply in advance'. Verified via official EU + WebSearch: EES is LIVE since 10 Apr 2026 (no advance action); ETIAS is NOT required yet (operational Q4 2026, mandatory ~Apr 2027). Reworded both languages; added passport-6-month-validity as its own line, a war-disruption refundable-fare/insurance note (highest money-loss risk per Expert), and noted the El Al Shabbat no-fly window blocks outbound Fri-eve/Sat departures too.

Deferred (MINOR, next cycle): error-fare may-not-be-honored caveat; Turkish July-1-2026 date already slipping (soften to mid-to-late 2026); ETIAS fee/process specifics (~EUR 7, ~10-min form) once it is required.
